posts.text:
🚨Sharp Money Tracker🚨
Just a few minutes from puck drop tonight. 15 games, a lot of value.. if you haven’t seen the tool. You’re in for a treat.
We’re monitoring the top bettors on prediction markets, organizing the data so you can see where their action is..
Lets catch fire tonight!!
Drop your plays below, I love a good sweat.
Enable hls playback

Yesterday: 3-2 and +2u
> Past 5 days:
14 wins
8 losses
+12.27u
> Cumulative profit for v12..
+24.75u → +29.70
> More plays on deck today.
> Like this post and follow if you’re riding with the sharps.

What are we grilling this weekend.....ribeyes, burgers, or shrimp?
> Because here’s how we pay for it!
> Diamondbacks ML -4u
Yankees -1.5 - 4u
Over 11.5 Pirates/Rockies -3u
White Sox +1.5 -3u
> That’s the card.
> Diamondbacks ML is the premium favorite:
98 V12
$47.8K behind it
2 proven wallets
1 HC sharp
> Yankees -1.5 is the best number:
96 V12
86% sharp money
+3.5% CLV
3 proven wallets
> Over 11.5 is the loud total:
98 V12
$56.6K behind it
100% sharp money
zero dissent
> Sox +1.5 is the cleaner dog:
95 V12
90% sharp money
3 proven wallets
> So what’s for dinner tonight?

Everybody is about to watch Team USA and the world cup...
Meanwhile, the sharps are looking somewhere else..
After a 3-1 day yesterday, here are the 2 spots drawing real money this afternoon:
Yankees -1.5
Under 7.5 Jays/Cubs
That’s the pair.
Yankees -1.5 is the louder side:
5 spread sharps
4 MLB winners
+$3.6M combined P&L
Pinnacle confirms
Under 7.5 is the cleaner total:
3 sharp wallets
100% of sharp money
zero dissent
So what’s the sharper move today:
Yankees run line
or the under?

Another day, another sharp-money board that paid...
3-1 today.
Winners:
Mets ML ✅✅
Over 9.5 ✅✅
Under 8.5 ✅✅
Only miss:
Brewers ML
Still good for +4.09u on the day.
AGS-U V12 is now:
127-104-5
55.0%
+27.70u
Were you on the Mets, the Over, or both?

We’re 1-1 today.
Now everything sharp is pointing to one game
Mets ML +103
Over 9.5
The Mets have the bigger wallet support:
7 proven winners
2 HC sharps
$67.8K behind them
91% sharp money
Pinnacle confirms
The Over has the cleaner consensus:
2 wallets
$16.7K behind 9.5
100% sharp money
no opposition
One side.
One total.
One choice.
Which ticket are you taking?

Another one just made the board.
Brewers ML -148
2 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$47.0K invested
one wallet dropped $43.5K
81% of sharp money landed on Milwaukee
Pinnacle still wants no part of it.
That’s what makes this one worth talking about.
Brewers
or Guardians?

The late-night play cashed.
Now the sharps are back this afternoon with one clear target:
Under 8.5 Jays/Sox
That’s the board so far...
4 proven MLB winners are on it.
4 wallets put $18.0K behind it.
82% of sharp money landed on 8.5.
Do you trust the sharp under
or think these bats blow it up?

Do we press our luck one more time tonight?
Over 7.5 Orioles/Mariners
1 proven MLB winner
$6.1K behind it
93% of sharp money
Last total on the board

The underdog just cashed 12-4.
Now the sharps are rolling into one more play tonight..
Sox ML -120 - 3u
That’s the add.
3 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$14.2K invested
84% of tracked sharp money
But once again, there’s tension:
Pinnacle opposes the play.
We stayed hot with Miami.
Do the sharps stay hot again with Boston?

We just went 3-0 in MLB moneylines yesterday.
Now sharp money is taking an early shot on one underdog this afternoon:
Marlins ML +103
2 proven MLB winners are backing it
$6.5K is already in
85% of tracked sharp money is on Miami
Pinnacle moved against the play.
So this one comes with conflict.
Sharp dog
or sharp trap?
Which side are you on?

And the sharps weren’t done....
Adding 2 more:
Phillies ML
Over 9.5 Mets/Reds
Phillies drew 4 wallets and $91.8K
with 90% of sharp money behind it.
Over 9.5 drew 3 wallets and $63.0K
with 99% of sharp money behind it.

We just went 2-0 in MLB yesterday. World cup is a different story.. (every game was a draw...🤔)
And tonight the sharps gave us a very clean board
Nationals ML - 6u
Astros ML - 4u
Braves ML - 4u
That’s the trio so far
Nationals is the loudest play on the slate.
5 proven MLB winners
2 HC sharps
$40.0K invested
94% of tracked sharp money
Astros is the heavier two-wallet attack.
2 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$34.6K invested
87% sharp money
line moved from -147 to -175
Braves is the cleaner consensus play.
2 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
100% sharp money
2-0 backing
Pinnacle confirms
Three plays

We have been tracking World Cup wallets live with everyone else.
Most of the board was noise.
This is the first play
Belgium ML
Here’s the sharp board
3 proven SOC winners
3 HC sharps
$198.1K invested
Pinnacle confirms
94% of tracked sharp money on Belgium
And this is where it gets loud:
Belgium has $198.1K behind it.
Egypt has $14.4K.
That is not a normal split.
One sharp dropped $126.3K on Belgium.
Another dropped $67.0K.
Both were sizing up.
Pinnacle moved from -160 to -180
and the market moved with the play.
So no...
this is not “we found a World Cup bet.”
This is the first World Cup play that finally met the standard.

This tier is 27-19 since inception..
Our first 5u sharp plays today..
Athletics ML
Cubs +1.5
Rockies/A’s under 13.5
Lets keep rolling

Sharps add two more plays..
Cardinals ML
Dodgers -1.5
Let’s have a day! Who’s following along, who’s tailing? Who’s fading?

The sharpest MLB wallets on the board keeping coming back to these three picks..
Braves ML
Astros ML
Yankees ML
That’s the trio
Braves are pure pressure.
4 proven MLB winners
2 HC sharps
$26.8K invested
multiple wallets sizing up
Astros are pure price.
2.5u PREMIUM
$6.0K invested
69% sharp money
best number still +100
Bookmark this.
Braves, Astros or Yankees?

Monster start.
V12 is 8-4 for +5.14u today
with late action still on deck.
That’s +15.6% ROI
Nationals ML ✅✅
Guardians ML ✅✅
Braves/Mets Under 8.5 ✅✅
Braves ML ✅✅
Dodgers -1.5 ✅✅
All cash.
And this is the part I love most..
beautiful seeing the sharp tracker finally work
the way I always knew it could.
Kudos to the OGs who have been here.
You saw the vision before the results got loud.
Today so far:
8-4
66.7%
33.0u risked
6 still pending
Bookmark this. Follow... Don't miss the edge..

The strongest board we have got even stronger 10 minutes before first pitch.
Two more totals just crashed the ELITE tier.
Now the real top shelf looks like this:
Diamondbacks ML
Nationals ML
Guardians ML
Braves/Mets Under 8.5
Rangers/Red Sox Under 7.5
That’s 5 ELITE plays in one afternoon.
Bookmark this.
Send it to a friend.
And tell me which ELITE play you trust most?

So this is not a random Saturday card.
It’s 3 ELITE swings

Which ELITE play are you building around first?

The Yankees miss hurt.
but the board still finished green..
> Phillies ML ✅
Marlins ML ✅
Under 7.5 ✅
> So even after the biggest loss on the card,
V12 and the sharps still finished 3-1
for +2.03u on the day.
> Did you stay with it after the Yankees loss?
Do you proof read this AI before you post? -200 to -201…

One sharp wallet just dropped $690.9K on the Yankees.
> That’s not a typo.
> Yankees ML -201
> 4 proven MLB winners
1 HC sharp
$693.4K invested
